parameters.query:
SELECT id, telegram_id, first_name, goal, daily_calorie_target
FROM users
WHERE telegram_id = $1

parameters.text: 📍 Restaurant Finder To find healthy restaurants near you, please share your location. Tap the button below 👇

values.content: You are a fitness nutrition coach. For each restaurant listed, write exactly ONE sentence (max 15 words) explaining why it fits the user's fitness goal. Be specific and practical.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO restaurant_searches (user_id, latitude, longitude, results, result_count)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5)
RETURNING id

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $('Build Restaurant Messages').item.json.userId,
  $('Build Restaurant Messages').item.json.lat,
  $('Build Restaurant Messages').item.json.lon,
  JSON.stringify($('Filter & Format Results').item.json.restaurants),
  $('Build Restaurant Messages').item.json.count
].join(',') }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO feature_events (user_id, feature_id, event_type, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'restaurant_finder', 'restaurants_found', $2::jsonb)

parameters.text:
😕 I couldn't find any highly-rated healthy restaurants within 1.5km of your location.

Try again later or in a different area!
❌ I didn't receive your location. Please tap /restaurants again and share your location when prompted.
